runtime.parser: JSON.parse (V8) for JSON-literal inputs; ECMAScript NumericLiteral for code-literal inputs

relation_to_policy: Cases here document what the runtime formatter produces for specific JS number literals. These outputs do not redefine policy. A divergence between runtime output and policy expected is an engineering finding, not a policy revision.
generation_protocol: Cases populated by running test/format-runtime.gen.ts under the documented Node version. Observed output written to tmp/formatter.runtime-node.observed.json. Promoted to a committed runtime golden (fixtures/formatter.runtime-node.golden.json) only when v0.2+ requires cross-runtime reproducibility evidence. In v0.1, the generator's output is diagnostic, not committed.
ci_rule: If fixtures/formatter.runtime-node.golden.json exists, it must have cases.length > 0 (CI fails otherwise). If it doesn't exist, the runtime-evidence test step reports SKIPPED, not PASS.
